_fixture_note: Anonymized real output from 2026-07-13 (7-day window). Query IDs randomized, warehouse/database names genericized. Used by the fixture-test CI check: assertions are structural (fields present, tables renderable, scope/latency notes carried through), never on exact wording.
scope_note: Totals cover user-managed warehouses only (WAREHOUSE_METERING_HISTORY). Serverless features (tasks, Snowpipe, etc.) bill separately and are not included.
data_latency_note: ACCOUNT_USAGE views lag real time: up to ~45 min for query history, up to ~3 h for metering.
